common.binary

Class AbstractRandomAccessStream

  • java.lang.Object
    • common.binary.AbstractBinaryStream
      • common.binary.AbstractRandomAccessStream
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.lang.AutoCloseable
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    RandomAccessReader, RandomAccessWriter

    public abstract class AbstractRandomAccessStream
extends AbstractBinaryStream
implements java.lang.AutoCloseable
    Base class for file-backed binary streams that use a RandomAccessFile for random-access I/O.

    This class provides common file positioning and length operations while delegating stream-specific reading and writing operations to subclasses.

    Version:
    1.1
    Author:
    Trevor Maggs

      Modifier and Type Field Description
      protected java.nio.file.Path fpath  
      protected java.io.RandomAccessFile raf

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void close()
      Closes the underlying RandomAccessFile.
      long getCurrentPosition()
      Returns the current file-pointer position.

      Returns the path of the file backing this stream.

      Returns the length of the underlying file in bytes.

      Moves the file pointer to the specified absolute position.

    • Field Detail

      • fpath

        protected final java.nio.file.Path fpath

      • raf

        protected final java.io.RandomAccessFile raf

    • Constructor Detail

      • AbstractRandomAccessStream

        public AbstractRandomAccessStream(java.nio.file.Path fpath,
                                  java.nio.ByteOrder order,
                                  java.lang.String mode)
                           throws java.io.IOException
        Creates a file-backed binary stream.
        Parameters:
        fpath - the file path
        order - the byte order used for multi-byte values
        mode - the RandomAccessFile access mode, such as "r" or "rw"
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - if any argument is null
        java.io.IOException - if the file cannot be opened

    • Method Detail

      • close

        public void close()
           throws java.io.IOException
        Closes the underlying RandomAccessFile.
        Specified by:
        close in interface java.lang.AutoCloseable
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - if an I/O error occurs

      • length

        public long length()
            throws java.io.IOException
        Returns the length of the underlying file in bytes.
        Specified by:
        length in class AbstractBinaryStream
        Returns:
        the file length in bytes
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - if an I/O error occurs

      • getCurrentPosition

        public long getCurrentPosition()
                        throws java.io.IOException
        Returns the current file-pointer position.
        Specified by:
        getCurrentPosition in class AbstractBinaryStream
        Returns:
        the current byte offset from the beginning of the file
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - if an I/O error occurs

      • seek

        public void seek(long n)
          throws java.io.IOException
        Moves the file pointer to the specified absolute position.
        Specified by:
        seek in class AbstractBinaryStream
        Parameters:
        n - the byte offset from the beginning of the file
        Throws:
        java.lang.IndexOutOfBoundsException - if the position is outside the file bounds
        java.io.IOException - if an I/O error occurs

      • getPath

        public java.nio.file.Path getPath()
        Returns the path of the file backing this stream.
        Returns:
        the file path
